text: Natural language processing, or NLP, is a branch of artificial intelligence that helps computers understand and interact with human language. It enables machines to perform tasks like text understanding, where they can identify the main points in a document or answer questions based on written content. Another important use is translation, allowing tools like Google Translate to convert text between languages. Sentiment analysis is also common, used by companies to determine if customer reviews are positive or negative. Finally, chatbots rely heavily on NLP to have conversations with users, answering questions or solving problems in real time.
